title: The Quest for the Moon Mother
summary: When the mischief rats of the basement lose their unfreezing powers to a thieving lion, Icicle the ice dragon is called upon to freeze them once and for all. Following this success, Dimatar and Seeker embark on a cosmic journey after consuming a magical Mars potion. Transformed into kittens, they are joined by the tiny Wobbly Whiskers, who is searching for her lost mother. Their quest leads them across the surface of Mars and into a high-tech cardboard rocket ship bound for the moon. After a successful lunar landing and a joyful family reunion, the group shares a final snack of fish before returning home by magic.

highlightQuote.text: I want the planet potion because I have planets on my dress, including one that's red.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: You want to sit on my lap-lap?

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: I need to sit criss-cross so that's what I'm going to do.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: There we go. Now, who would you like to tell a story about?

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: Dimatar and Icicle.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: And who's- who starts?

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: Dimatar.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Well, once upon a time, ding-dong. And Dimatar said, "Who is it?"

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: It's your friend Icicle.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Oh, come on in, Icicle. And Dimatar invited Icicle, the gigantic white ice dragon, into his castle on the perfectly circular island.

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: And Icicle said, "I have some fishies." And Dimatar said, "I'll freeze one."

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: And then he ate it. And then Dimatar, you just had yours plain.

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: Yeah, I don't like frozen as much. I like to eat them fresh or maybe salted sometimes or fried. Have you ever had fried fish, Icicle?

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: No, you only like frozen fish, huh? Well, you know what we have in common? We both like fish and we both like them crunchy. Crunch, crunch, crunch, crunch, crunch, crunch, crunch. And so Dimatar and Icicle had a lovely snack of fishies. And then...

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: Until...

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Dun-dun-dun! What happened? Something happened.

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: Ding dong!

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Oh, who is it? said Dimatar.

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: It's Seeker. And Seeker said, "I thought I could take Dimatar for a potion. And Icicle, you have a job. Your job is to freeze the mischief rats."

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: The mischief rats! said Icicle. Now, what did they do to deserve that?

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: They don't unfreeze the ice cause they lost their power, cause lion stole took their power.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Now wait a- wait just a minute here, this sounds like a complicated story. You're saying these mischief rats once had the power to unfreeze the ice but they've lost that power because the lion stole- took it away?

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: Yeah, he stole it from their power switches inside of their tails, and that's what caused them to have that power.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: My goodness! said Icicle. And he turned around to check his own tail to see if he had power switches because Icicle, as you know, being an ice dragon, has the power to use his freezing breath. But he did not find a power switch on his own tail, to his great relief. And then he said, "Well, where are these mischief rats?"

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: They are in the basement of Dimatar's house.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: They're in the basement right now? My goodness!

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: Right now. And they're waiting to be freeze by you.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: My basement? Mischief rats in my basement? I never go in the basement. I guess they're down there, they're probably eating our trash.

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: Yep, they're eating your trash.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: But the basement door is way too small for Icicle who's huge. Do you think you could just stick your head in there, Icicle? And what did Icicle say?

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: Um, Icicle said, "I'll just unscrew the door and I'll walk down the steps and get into the basement."

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Oh, good idea. And so Icicle unscrewed the door and walked down the steps, and what did he see there?

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: The rats!

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: And what were they doing?

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: Eating his trash!

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: No! And so what did Icicle do?

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: He froze them.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: He went (blowing noise) with his frosty ice breath and all the mischief rats were frozen into blocks of ice. And they couldn't move, they were frozen solid. And Icicle came back up and he said, "Uh, now what do we do with them?"

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: Um, um, um, Dimatar went on a potion with Seeker. Seeker, um, um, you can't do the diamond-shaped one, do the circle-shaped one.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Oh, the circle-shaped potion? said Seeker. Which one though? I think I have a lot of circle-shaped potions. Do you mean this circle-shaped one that's kind of donut-shaped? Or this other circle-shaped one that's kind of swirly and full of...?

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: The circle-shaped bottle one. I want that circle-shaped like a bottle.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Well, I'm saying I've got a few circle-shaped bottles. This one's full of, like, the night sky and stars all swirling, and this one's white like the moon and...

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: No, no, no! I want the... I want it, I want it, I want the Mars planet one!

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Oh, why didn't you just say so? said Seeker. Okay, well this one is circular shaped and a deep red color, just like the planet Mars.

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: Let's try that one. Because, Seeker, I want the planet potion because I have planets on my dress, including one that's red.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: And Seeker said, "My goodness, what a beautiful dress! You know, my red cloak that I'm very proud of is very beautiful and it even has decorations, but it doesn't have any planets."

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: Well, mine has planets.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: I like it a lot.

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: And then there's a purple cloak you can borrow. Here, here's your purple cloak- here's a purple cloak.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Oh, that's- that's- it has a snap in the back that I can do for you.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Oh, thanks! Oh, perfect. Oh, it fits just right. I love this purple cloak, said Seeker. Now, would you like to take a sip of this Mars potion?

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: Well... oh, meow-meow, I don't want to be me!

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Who's that? Who's meowing?

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: It's me! It's- it's- it's Wobbly Whiskers the kitten!

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Look, said Seeker to Dimatar, there's a little kitten here. Do you want to come to Mars with us, Wobbly Whiskers?

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: Yeah, I never heard about planets! And- and- and I thought I could look there and I thought I could look for my mom there.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Your mom? Well, I don't think your mom is on Mars probably, but you never know. So let's go. And Seeker took a sip of the Mars potion...

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: Or Seeker's being Mexico.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Oh, so possible. And then Dimatar took a sip, and then Wobbly Whiskers took a sip, and then who said the rhyme?

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: Maybe Wobbly Whiskers did.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Wobbly Whiskers did. What was the rhyme?

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: Meow, meow, meow, meow.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Meow, meow, meow, meow. And then they all said, meow, meow, meow, meow. And then, poof! They poofed away from Dimatar's castle and poof! They appeared on the planet Mars. Now, were they on the top of an ancient dormant volcano? Or were they deep inside of a crater? Or were they on the polar ice caps of Mars where everything is cold and frozen?

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: Um, they hopped everywhere looking for Mom until they spot a small black cat far away on the moon.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: On the moon? Oh, they've got to go to the moon! They just have to.

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: Here Seeker, here's my big cardboard rocket ship.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Oh, thanks, said Seeker. I was wondering how they were going to get there. And so Seeker and Dimatar...

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: I brought it. I also brought a black- I also brought a white computer and a black computer. There's one control panel and there's one to control a blue walkie-talkie. It can talk to aliens!

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Amazing! Hey, do you know how to fly this thing? said Seeker. I only know how to fly my sky ship.

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: Um, yeah. Just- just press the- the button that points up.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Oh. And Seeker pressed the up button once everyone was safely on board and buckled up. And then what happened when he pressed it?

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: It flew to the moon! (rocket sound)

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: It shot up off the surface of Mars, through the space between Mars and the moon, and then dodged the asteroids- zoom, zoom, zoom! And then, oh, here comes the moon, a big round gray and white and black circle appeared in the... in front of them and then they landed on the moon.

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: And then- and then the white kitten ran straight to her mother. Meow, meow, meow, meow! And what did the mama say?

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: "You found me! Thank goodness. Now can we please go home?"

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: Of course! And- and did you bring my fish snack?

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: And Dimatar said, "Uh-oh. No, no, no. We did have some fish snacks but I ate them all. Gulp, gulp, gulp, gulp, gulp."

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: The mom said, "I- I brought some fish snacks and here's a frozen one for Icicle and here's one for you, Dimatar, and here's one for you, Seeker, and... here's- and here's a whole box for you, kittens."

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Yum, yum, yum, yum, yum! said the kittens. And so everyone had their delicious fish snacks, and then they used the going home potion to go back home. And that's the end of our story.

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: The shadow puppets! The shadow puppets!

characters.name: Dimitar
characters.description: A sharp-witted resident of a circular island castle, this two-century-old purple dragonet carries a pirate’s salt-crusted legacy and a fierce devotion to his salvaged library. Formerly of the Cadasori galleries, Seeker’s grumpy companion now roams the deep to save his ancestral shores, though a recent volcanic disturbance has left him uncharacteristically sickened and frail. Driven by habit and a tireless appetite for fish, he bickers incessantly over snacks while guarding his remaining volumes with a brooding, protective intensity.

characters.name: Icicle
characters.description: A titanic and ancient white ice dragon, this towering companion to Dimitar commands the skies with freezing breath and vast, powerful wings. From a shimmering ice palace atop a remote mountain peak, he presides over his crystalline domain with a timeless and frigid majesty, sustained exclusively by a diet of frozen fish.

characters.name: Seeker
characters.description: A brave dwarven explorer and mediator, he resides in a glowing castle hub—a multiversal dock for skyships anchored within the skyline of New York City. From this urban sanctum, he conducts silver slime experiments and tends to wandering cats amidst a massive library. Frequently swapping between a red coat and a mystical purple cloak, his braided red beard remains his most eccentric tool, capable of catching small fish. A master of fusion, he combines ancient stone-craft with high-velocity mechanics, utilizing a legendary magic ladder to scale the shifting architecture of the realms. Whether brewing portal potions, harvesting floof-berries in Limbo with gemstone goggles, or aiding Buddy the Mouse, this walnut-loving student of the stars remains the hero who orchestrated the daring rescue of the world.

characters.name: Mischief Rats
characters.description: Naughty creatures residing in a basement who lost their unfreezing powers when a lion stole their tail-switches.

characters.name: Lion
characters.description: A thief who stole the power switches from the tails of the mischief rats.

characters.name: Wobbly Whiskers
characters.description: A small white kitten, slick with the sticky, iridescent residue of the potion bottle she tumbled from, who joins the adventure in a desperate search for her lost mother.

characters.name: Wobbly Whiskers' Mother
characters.description: A small black cat who is eventually located on the moon.

places.name: Castle on the perfectly circular island
places.description: The home of Dimitar where the adventure begins.

places.name: The Basement
places.description: This sun-drenched storage nook, home to Isabella’s weathered treehouse dollhouse and a collection of cherished older toys, remains notable as the place where Popplemoll once searched for his elusive cat, Gemstone. However, beneath the radiant dust motes, the space has become a secret sanctuary for mischief rats, who hide among the nostalgic relics to hoard and feast on scavenged trash.

places.name: Planet Mars
places.description: A red planet reached by drinking a circular red potion.

places.name: The Moon
places.description: Visible from Earth as a pockmarked sphere of gray, white, and black, this low-gravity waypoint for sun-bound crews is a playground of ancient space rocks and leaping Floofers; its silver dust now serves as a silent sanctuary for a misplaced book and the long-lost mother cat.
